_doc.purpose: Localization companion for nsfw_reproductionTemplates.json. Holds en-us entries for the Menstruation-type and Estrus-type reproduction cycle stage descriptions.

en-us.MenstruationStatus_PrePuberty_tooltip: The stage before sexual maturity, when the menstrual cycle has not yet begun.
en-us.MenstruationStatus_Menstrual_tooltip: The first stage of the menstrual cycle, in which the uterine lining sheds and is expelled with the menstrual blood.
en-us.MenstruationStatus_PreOvulation_tooltip: The stage after menstruation ends and before ovulation, during which the follicle gradually matures.
en-us.MenstruationStatus_Ovulation_tooltip: The stage in which a mature egg is released from the ovary and enters the fallopian tube to await fertilization.
en-us.MenstruationStatus_Rest_tooltip: The stage from ovulation until the next period arrives. If conception doesn't occur, menstruation follows.
en-us.MenstruationStatus_Pregnant_tooltip: The egg has been fertilized and implanted; currently pregnant.
en-us.MenstruationStatus_None_tooltip: The stage in which the menstrual cycle has permanently stopped.
en-us.EstrusStatus_PrePuberty_tooltip: The stage before sexual maturity, when the estrus cycle has not yet begun.
en-us.EstrusStatus_Proestrus_tooltip: The preparatory stage of the estrus cycle, just before estrus begins.
en-us.EstrusStatus_Estrus_tooltip: The core stage of the estrus cycle, when eggs are ready for fertilization.
en-us.EstrusStatus_Interestrus_tooltip: The resting stage between two estrus periods, awaiting the start of the next estrus cycle.
en-us.EstrusStatus_None_tooltip: The stage in which the estrus cycle has permanently ended.
en-us.Status_PostPregnancy_tooltip: The recovery period after giving birth.
en-us.humanRace_dragon_MenstruationStatus_Mens: The preparatory stage before the breeding season arrives; the body gradually enters a breeding state.
en-us.humanRace_dragon_MenstruationStatus_Rest: The long resting stage after the breeding season ends; the reproductive system becomes dormant.
